mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.select */ select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.pblanc_id , ubpa.rcept_odr , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpa.member_id , fn_cmm_get_member_nm(ubpa.member_id) as member_nm , ubpa.apply_file_group_id , ubpa.rcept_dt , ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_CODE_GROUP}', ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd) as rcept_sttus , ubpa.rcept_sttus_dt , ubpa.makeup_opinion_cn , ubpa.makeup_req_cn , ubpa.reject_reason_cn , ubpa.slctn , ubpa.slctn_dt , ubpa.creator_id , ubpa.created_dt , ubpa.updater_id , ubpa.updated_dt , (select member_type from cmmt_member cm where member_id = ubpa.member_id ) as member_type from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa where ubpa.apply_id = #{applyId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectChargerAuth */ select ubc.charger_author_cd from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} where ubpa.apply_id = #{applyId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectListCount */ select count(ubpa.apply_id) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectList */ select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.receipt_no , to_char(ubpa.rcept_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as rcept_dt , ubpa.rcept_odr , ubp.pblanc_nm , ub.bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , cm.member_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_CODE_GROUP}', ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd) as rcept_sttus , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@PS_CODE_GROUP}', ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd) as pblanc_sttus , row_number() over (order by ubpa.rcept_dt ${sortOrder}) as rn from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectEntrpsSttusListCount */ select count(sub.*) from ( select ubpa.apply_id , ub.bsns_cd , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_id from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id where ubpa.slctn = true
and cm.member_nm like concat('%', #{entrpsNm}, '%')
and cm.bizrno like concat('%', #{bizrno}, '%')
and 1 = 0
union all select ubpa.apply_id , ub.bsns_cd , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_id from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs on ubs.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd on ubpd.bsns_slctn_id = ubs.bsns_slctn_id inner join uspt_task_prtcmpny utp on utp.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_last_slctn_id = ulst.evl_last_slctn_id and uels.last_slctn = true inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uep.evl_type_cd = 'EVTY03' and uep.evl_sttus_cd = 'EVST03' inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} where ulst.slctn = true
and utp.entrps_nm like concat('%', #{entrpsNm}, '%')
and 1 = 0
and 1 = 0
) sub

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectList */ select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.rcept_dt , ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd , ubpa.rcept_sttus_dt , ubpat.task_nm_ko , ubp.pblanc_id , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.rcept_bgnde , ubp.rcept_endde , ubp.rcept_closing_hm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_CODE_GROUP}', ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd) as rcept_sttus from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectListCount */ select count(ubpa.apply_id) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id

sql.where:
ubpa.slctn = true
and usm.last_slctn_trget_id is null
and usm.last_slctn_trget_id is not null
and ubpae.indust_realm_cd = #{industRealmCd}
and ubpat.rspnber_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and cm.member_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ubpa.receipt_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectStdntMtchListCount */ select count(distinct ubpa.apply_id) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt_ent ubpae on ubpae.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id left outer join uspt_stdnt_mtch usm on usm.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectStdntMtchList */ select ubpa.apply_id , ulst.last_slctn_trget_id , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubpat.rspnber_nm , cm.member_nm , count(usm.last_slctn_trget_id) as stdnt_mtchcnt , row_number() over (order by ubpa.receipt_no) as rn , case when count(usm.last_slctn_trget_id) = 0 then '대기중' else '완료' end as process_sttus from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt_ent ubpae on ubpae.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id left outer join uspt_stdnt_mtch usm on usm.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id
group by ubpa.apply_id , ulst.last_slctn_trget_id, ubpat.apply_id, cm.member_id offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectStdntMtch */ select distinct ubpa.apply_id , ulst.last_slctn_trget_id , ubpa.receipt_no , cm.member_nm , cm.bizrno , ubc.charger_author_cd , ubpat.task_nm_ko , ubpat.task_nm_en , ubp.bsns_bgnde , ubp.bsns_endde , ( select apply_realm_nm from uspt_bsns_apply_realm where apply_realm_id = ubpat.apply_realm_id and bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd ) as apply_realm_nm , case when (select count(*) from uspt_stdnt_mtch where ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = last_slctn_trget_id) = 0 then '대기중' else '완료' end as process_sttus from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id where ubpa.slctn = true and ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = #{lastSlctnTrgetId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectStdntCareerListCount */ select count(ubpa.apply_id) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id and cm.member_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_IND_CODE_GROUP}' left outer join uspt_stdnt_mtch usm on usm.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.selectStdntCareerList */ select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.receipt_no , cm.member_nm , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@HOPE_CODE_GROUP}', ubpat.hope_dty_cd) as hope_dty , case when usm.last_slctn_trget_id is not null then '매칭완료' else '대기중' end as mtch_at , ( select fn_cmm_get_member_nm(ubpa2.member_id) from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa2 on ubpa2.apply_id = ulst.apply_id where ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = usm.last_slctn_trget_id ) as mtch_instt , ubc.charger_author_cd , cm.member_id , cm.enc_email , cm.enc_mobile_no , row_number() over (order by ubpa.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id and cm.member_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_IND_CODE_GROUP}' left outer join uspt_stdnt_mtch usm on usm.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntDao.seletMyBsnsNtcnList */ select job_nm , pblanc_nm , sttus_nm from ( select '사업신청' as job_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_CODE_GROUP}', ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd) as sttus_nm , ubpa.updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId} and ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd in ('TEMP', 'REJECT', 'MAKEUP') union all select '성과' as job_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RSLT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.rslt_sttus_cd) as sttus_nm , ur.updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_rslt ur on ur.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and ur.rslt_sttus_cd in ('PR', 'SR') where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId} union all select case when ur.reprt_type_cd = 'I' then '중간보고서' else '결과보고서' end as job_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_sttus_cd) as sttus_nm , ur.updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and uep.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and ulst.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_reprt ur on ur.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id and ur.reprt_sttus_cd in ('PR', 'SR') where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId} union all select '발표자료' as job_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PRESNATN_PROCESS_DIV', uet.presnatn_process_div_cd ) as sttus_nm , uet.updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and uep.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_sect us on us.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.sect_id = us.sect_id and uet.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id and uet.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and uet.presnatn_process_div_cd in ('PRPR01', 'PRPR03') where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId} union all select '협약' as job_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CNVN_CODE_GROUP}', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd ) as sttus_nm , ubc.updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc on ubc.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd in ('CNST03') and BSNM_SIGN_DT is null where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId} union all select '협약-참여기업' as job_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CNVN_CODE_GROUP}', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd ) as sttus_nm , ubc.updated_dt from uspt_task_prtcmpny utp inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utp.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd in ('CNST03') left outer join uspt_bsns_cnvn_prtcmpny_sign ubcps on ubcps.bsns_cnvn_id = ubc.bsns_cnvn_id and ubcps.member_id = utp.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpa.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id where utp.member_id = #{memberId} and ubcps.bsns_cnvn_prtcmpny_sign_id is null ) sub order by sub.updated_dt desc limit 5
